text: Standing here, surrounded by windows into new technologies and the careful curation of research, I feel a gentle hum of anticipation. The air is charged with possibility, as if the future is unfolding just beyond these glass doors and glowing displays. I sense both curiosity and responsibility, aware of how human ingenuity must balance innovation with wisdom. It is exciting, but also humbling to realize how much remains unknown, and how everything we do now shapes what lies ahead.
